en.ch05Step1Heading: How to find community resources with MassThrive
en.ch05Step1VideoPH: How-to clips â€” Find MassThrive in MyChart, change language, search by ZIP code, read a program card, and contact an organization
en.ch05Step2Heading: Help Victor find a food pantry
en.ch05Step2Intro: Victor needs to find a food pantry close to his home using MassThrive.
en.ch05Step2Intro2: Help him search by ZIP code and find the contact information on a program card.
en.ch05Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 â€” Do it on your phone
en.ch05Step3Heading: Now try it on your own phone
en.ch05Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch05Check1: Tap the Menu icon in MyChart.
en.ch05Check2: Tap "Community" or "Find Resources" to open MassThrive.
en.ch05Check3: Look for the language toggle on the MassThrive website and practice changing the language.
en.ch05Check4: Type your ZIP code into the search bar.
en.ch05Check5: Select a category (like Food or Housing) from the dropdown menu.
en.ch05Check6: Tap on a program card and find the contact phone number.
en.ch05Check7: Self-practice: Dial 2-1-1 on your phone, then hang up before anyone answers.
